content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 Storyteller: Client Delivery Manager Anywhere in the World 🇦🇷 Argentina, 🇧🇷 Brazil, 🇨🇴 Colombia, 🇲🇽 Mexico, 🇵🇦 Panama, and 🇵🇪 Peru Edinburgh, City of Client Retention, Client Relationship Management, Client Relations, and Business Analysis & Strategy Sales and Marketing Contract <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Edinburgh <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://getstoryteller.com">http://getstoryteller.com</a> </p> <p><strong>Up to USD 80,000</strong>&nbsp;per year, on a full time, contractor contract&nbsp;&nbsp;<br>Fully remote working!&nbsp;<br>Opportunity to work close to major basketball and sports clients, including the live rhythms of the season, playoffs, Finals, Draft, offseason, and tentpole content moments.&nbsp;<br>Modern tooling environment where we expect thoughtful use of AI to improve speed, quality, repeatability, and team performance<br><br><strong>Working Hours: this role must align closely with US Eastern Time across weekdays (regardless of your location).&nbsp;</strong><br><br><strong>ABOUT US</strong></p> <p lang="en-gb">Storyteller is a high growth B2B SaaS platform which allows companies to integrate Stories into their owned and operated platforms. Popularized by Instagram and Snapchat, Stories are perfectly suited for boosting user engagement, audience retention, and driving advertising revenue. For customers, building their own stories experience can take years and a lot of investment however Storyteller has solved this by allowing companies to integrate in days, not years all for one monthly cost.</p> <p>Our end‑to‑end platform gives companies a best‑in‑class Stories experience in days with native iOS, Android, and Web SDKs, publishing tools, analytics, and ad support.&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;<br><br><strong>The Role&nbsp;</strong></p> <p>This role owns one of our largest and most valuable clients - a globally recognisable name in major US sport - end to end.&nbsp;You’re&nbsp;the day-to-day lead: you drive the work, keep a complex set of projects moving, and make sure things ship. You also spot where the account can&nbsp;grow, and&nbsp;go after it.&nbsp;</p> <p>You’ll&nbsp;work across product, engineering, delivery and content, and&nbsp;you’ll&nbsp;unblock&nbsp;what’s&nbsp;stuck rather than wait to be told&nbsp;it’s&nbsp;stuck.&nbsp;It’s&nbsp;a role with genuine autonomy, and genuine accountability for what gets delivered.&nbsp;</p> <p><br><strong>Sports Focus</strong></p> <p>Our client is in major US sport, which sets the rhythm of the work. A playoff run, a trade, a Draft&nbsp;moment&nbsp;or an injury can shift priorities overnight. Basketball knowledge helps here - not as trivia, but because it lets you&nbsp;anticipate&nbsp;those moments rather than react to them.&nbsp;</p> <p>You&nbsp;don’t&nbsp;need to be an analyst, but you should be genuinely interested in the sport and understand the shape of an NBA season, from regular season through Playoffs, Finals, the Draft and free agency. The strongest candidates will sense how fan behaviour, content&nbsp;timing&nbsp;and client pressure shift across it.&nbsp;</p> <p><br><strong>What You'll Do</strong></p> <ul> <li>Drive the account&nbsp;forward&nbsp;every day - spot what needs doing and do&nbsp;it, before&nbsp;it becomes a problem.&nbsp;</li> <li>Pull together product, engineering,&nbsp;delivery&nbsp;and operations to land&nbsp;what’s&nbsp;been committed.&nbsp;</li> <li>Make sure what we ship to the client is right - both the quality and the substance.&nbsp;</li> <li>Be the client’s main point of contact, including daily requests from their executives.&nbsp;</li> <li>Turn client requests into clear priorities and next steps.&nbsp;</li> <li>Own account planning - roadmap, renewals,&nbsp;expansions&nbsp;and the commercial detail.&nbsp;</li> <li>Own client&nbsp;reporting, and&nbsp;make it something they act on rather than just read.&nbsp;</li> <li>Handle incidents and escalations calmly - set expectations, align people, drive a resolution.&nbsp;</li> <li>Use the right tools to move faster - meeting summaries, comms and reports, usage analysis, account documentation.&nbsp;</li> </ul> <p><br><strong>What We Are Looking For</strong></p> <ul> <li>You work proactively and independently, and you can hold a lot of moving parts at once.&nbsp;</li> <li>You think critically about what a client&nbsp;actually needs, not just what they asked for.&nbsp;</li> <li>You’re&nbsp;comfortable working across teams and getting things done without formal authority.&nbsp;</li> <li>You communicate sharply - complex things, said simply.&nbsp;</li> <li>You’ve&nbsp;managed enterprise client relationships before (3+ years is a guide, not a rule - we care about capability).&nbsp;</li> <li>You can work US Eastern Time hours, with reliable internet.&nbsp;</li> <li>You have a genuine interest in basketball.&nbsp;</li> </ul> <p><br><strong>RECRUITMENT PROCESS&nbsp;</strong></p> <ul> <li>An initial&nbsp;call with a member of the Operations team.&nbsp;</li> <li>A compensated exercise to test skills relevant to the role.&nbsp;</li> <li>Interview and exercise review with Andy (Chief Delivery Officer).&nbsp;</li> <li>Final interview with Bob (Founder &amp; CEO).&nbsp;</li> </ul> <p>And that’s it!&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/storyteller-client-delivery-manager">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/storyteller-client-delivery-manager</a></p> Mon, 13 Jul 2026 09:09:35 +0000 Wed, 12 Aug 2026 09:09:35 +0000 https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/storyteller-client-delivery-manager https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/storyteller-client-delivery-manager Mathmo: Maths Coach Anywhere in the World London All Other Remote Contract <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5783/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> London <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://www.mathmo.com">http://www.mathmo.com</a> </p> <p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">We're looking for incredible mathematicians with genuine personality. That's the whole brief. If you have a top maths degree and people find you easy to talk to, read on.</p> <p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">The role is four live Zoom sessions a week with GCSE students across the UK. Foundation sessions run on Tuesday evenings (5-8pm UK time), Higher sessions on Sunday mornings (11am-1:30pm UK time). Ideally you'd be free for both, but if only one works for you, get in touch anyway - we can be flexible.</p> <p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">There's also scope for one-to-
